name: NIHR Efficacy and Mechanism Evaluation (EME) Programme — researcher-led
summary: 资助严谨评估某项干预/器械"是否有效、为何有效"的研究项目。偏学术证据生成而非典型创业资助，适合已有 NHS / 学术合作方时申请。

name: Royal Academy of Engineering — Enterprise Fellowships
deadlineHint: 2026 年 7 月中重新开放 Stage 1；往年 7 月批次 Stage 1 约在 8 月下旬截止（本次日期为估算，需上官网确认）
summary: 面向应届毕业生/研究者的深科技孵化项目。最高 £75,000 无股权资助，配一对一导师 + 12 个月培训，不占 IP。robotics 硕士背景 + 讲师身份可走 "researcher" 通道。

name: UnLtd Awards — Starting Up / Scaling Up
deadlineHint: 新一轮已于 2026-07-01 开放；每轮限 650 份申请，通常几天内额满
summary: 面向 16 岁以上社会企业家的非稀释性资助。Starting Up 最高 £8,000（idea / 早期阶段），Scaling Up 最高 £18,000（已运营 1–4 年，可覆盖工资与生活成本），并配一年一对一辅导。

name: EIC Accelerator（Step 2，英国企业仅 Grant-only 选项）
deadlineHint: Step 2 截止 2026-09-02（Step 1 需提前数周提交）
summary: 英国企业 Brexit 后只能走纯 Grant 模式（最高 €2.5M）。面向已有一定商业验证、准备规模化的深科技企业，对 TactiCall 现阶段门槛偏高，可作为 1–2 年后的目标。

name: RNID Discovery Research Grant
summary: 最高 £225K（单年不超 £75K），专门资助听力损失/耳鸣相关研究，也支持"听力损失与痴呆症关联"方向——正好能把听力损失驱动痴呆症的论述落到实处。通常需挂靠大学/研究机构申请。

name: NIHR HTA Application Development Grant
summary: 资助撰写一份严谨的健康技术评估（HTA）申请本身的前期工作，帮助把真实世界证据/成本效益论证做扎实，为后续更大的 NHS 相关资助铺路。

name: Bethnal Green Ventures — Tech for Good Programme
deadlineHint: 2026 秋季批次已截止；下一批预计 2026 年 11 月开放申请（2027 年初启动），建议现在先订阅通知
summary: £60,000 现金投资（占股）+ 6 周高强度加速器。你之前已和 BGV 的 Paul 聊过，可以关注下一轮开放时间。

name: Microsoft AI for Accessibility Grant
deadlineHint: 申请通道目前关闭，滚动重开，需持续关注官网公告
summary: 面向"用 AI 服务残障群体"的项目，提供 Azure 算力额度（$10K–$20K）+ 工程/数据标注相关现金资助。往年获资助项目中有一款高度类似 TactiCall 的产品（SmartEar：监听门铃/火警并做视觉提示），说明这个方向平台认可，值得蹲下一轮。

name: King's Trust（原 Prince's Trust）Enterprise Programme
summary: 18–30 岁创业者可申请，最高 £5,000 资助 + 导师，金额较小，更适合非常早期/个人层面的起步成本。

name: Discovery Research Grant
summary: Our Discovery Research Grants support projects that will generate knowledge to underpin the discovery of treatments for hearing loss or tinnitus, or improve how new treatments are developed and tested. Find out more about the Discovery Research Grant.
snippet: Our Discovery Research Grants support projects that will generate knowledge to underpin the discovery of treatments for hearing loss or tinnitus, or improve how new treatments are developed and tested. Find out more about the Discovery Research Grant.

name: PhD studentships
summary: Our PhD studentship scheme aims to encourage the best students to become involved in hearing, deafness and tinnitus research in the UK. Find out more about the PhD studentships.
snippet: Our PhD studentship scheme aims to encourage the best students to become involved in hearing, deafness and tinnitus research in the UK. Find out more about the PhD studentships.

name: Innovation Seed Fund
summary: Our Innovation Seed Fund aims to provide funding to support a range of valuable small scale activities Through our Innovation Seed Fund grants, we aim to pump-prime innovative research into the causes, treatment and diagnosis of hearing loss, tinnitus and other hearing-related conditions.
